name_cn:
Top Quality with Full Packaging
In Stock!!️
Dior 24 new Underarm Saddle Bag, lightweight and cute, can be carried by hand or on the shoulder! Made of carefully selected goat leather, iconic letter hardware, exquisite bag shape 👏🏻, simple, stylish and versatile, small capacity, lightweight and easy to match ~ grab and go 🤗
size:19.5*4.5*16cm
